metadata.description: Ray Fernando's collection of installable Skill files for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: running-bug-review-board
plugins.description: Real-user QA workflow with a Bug Review Board (BRB). Files structured P0/P1/P2 bug reports, generates a Zite + Dieter Rams-inspired magazine HTML dashboard (typography over chips, ink-on-paper palette, 640px reading column, mobile thumb-zone), syncs bi-directionally with Linear / GitHub / Jira / Notion (discovered and confirmed, never assumed), and ships a separate Interactive BRB workflow with pattern-based triage suggestions. v0.3 adds Impact and Risk-to-fix bug fields for engineer-reviewer triage. For iOS app repos, orchestrates around the iOS community's simulator skills (AXe, XcodeBuildMCP, baguette, ios-simulator-skill, ios-build-verify, ASC CLI, and more).
